evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implementing quality assurance checks to enhance reporting consistency
evidence.domain_risk: Converting Finance requirements into technical solutions
evidence.data_team_maturity: Architect, build, and maintain efficient and reliable data models and pipelines
evidence.jd_authorship: Converting Finance requirements into technical solutions through requirements gathering
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Converting Finance requirements into technical solutions through requirements gathering
evidence.autonomy_level: Converting Finance requirements into technical solutions through requirements gathering
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Architect, build, and maintain efficient and reliable data models and pipelines
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The quote pairs new architecture and build work with ongoing maintenance, indicating both greenfield creation and fix/scale responsibilities.
evidence.work_arrangement: Hybrid work arrangement (2 office days recommended)
evidence.ai_role: Architect, build, and maintain efficient and reliable data models and pipelines
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools, GenAI infrastructure, or AI-first approach; standard data engineering work.
evidence.testing_framing: Implementing quality assurance checks to enhance reporting consistency
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Active ownership verb (implementing) paired with quality practice (assurance checks).
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Architect, build, and maintain efficient and reliable data models and pipelines
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Emphasizes reliability as core concern, reflecting operational stability focus without regulatory or compliance dominance.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Multiple rigour signals (QA, documentation, code quality, production reliability) with zero velocity signals.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Finance function at a marketplace affects business decisions without explicit regulatory, compliance, or financial reporting language to indicate high-risk domain work.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Specific tools mentioned (dbt, BigQuery, Airflow) in context of building and maintaining suggest an established data function actively growing.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Technically specific bullets on Finance translation and production reliability mixed with generic boilerplate on amplifying impact.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: This explicitly identifies Finance as the primary stakeholder being served, reinforced by the job title 'Analytics Engineer, Finance'.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role receives scoped requirements from Finance stakeholders and executes technical solutions to meet them, rather than setting strategic direction or defining priorities for the analytics function.
